degraded: F0 suite RED on ONE pre-existing, foreign failure: test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact flags a decision-drop belonging to iterate-2026-07-18-fr-existence-gate (gitignored drops resolve from the MAIN root, so a concurrent iterate's drop reddens this worktree). Verified identical on clean origin/main 7c303a8b - inherited, not introduced.

unit counts are the two suites measured directly and observed (shared/tests 4423 passed / 11 skipped, incl. the foreign failure; shipwright-compliance 1200 passed / 1 skipped). run_test_suite.py suppresses the output of passing units, so a whole-monorepo aggregate was not observable; no number here is estimated.

surface_verification.justification: This iterate's user-facing surface is the accepted_risks_cli reconciler. The F0.5 runner drives it end-to-end via subprocess against the REAL repo register and the REAL security.yml - not a fixture - and asserts both the clean path and the fail-closed path. No web/API surface exists in this diff.

behaviors.behavior: Register: valid document parses; ISO-string `expires` accepted
Per-field validation rejects missing expires / missing rationale_ref / unknown target / unparseable date / filler ref / prose ref / empty id / short statement
Duplicate ids rejected; all four rationale_ref forms (ADR-NNN, iterate-run-id, #NNN, DO-NOT #NNN) accepted
Expiry: due date itself still active, day after expires; expired() filters; today_utc is UTC
Decision-ref recognizer stays == the PR #401 ci_supplychain gate (drift pin, both ends)
github-dismissal is a valid target but is NOT statically checkable
LIVE GATE: this repo's register and its real suppressions agree; nothing past due; register loadable+non-empty; every seeded ref names a recorded decision
behaviors.evidence: test_accepted_risks_register.py - 4 passed (run against the real repo)

behaviors.behavior: Drift negative controls: unrecorded suppression fails, stale entry fails, matching pair clean, non-static target is not drift, unchecked is reported
Workflow parsing: commented env lines are inert; ${{ }} expressions parse; toggle truthiness matches the producer's own set
Trivyignore: classic flat-text form read; YAML form wins over flat
CLI main(): check/expire pass on the real repo; non-zero on drift; exit 2 fail-closed on a malformed register; no-op without a register; expiry and drift reported separately
Dashboard correlation: registered+active collapses to ONE row; registered-only flagged; unregistered rendered as drift; audit fields reach the row; expiry vs now
Dashboard degradation: malformed register announced, absent register is not a degradation
Trivyignore forms via the view: flat read, YAML scope carried, missing file empty
Rendered section: unregistered not laundered into 'accepted'; authority rendered; expired AND unrecorded BOTH reported (composed status); degradation note rendered
Back-compat: parse_accepted_risks still returns {id, expired_at, expired} for the grade re-export bridge

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behavior introduced or changed by this diff, grouped into 17 rows over 62 new tests plus 1 pre-existing back-compat row. No 'untestable' rows: all behaviour here is offline and deterministic. The one un-probeable claim (that a maintainer token can PATCH a code-scanning alert) belongs to the deferred --apply work and is carried on trg-13b8283b rather than asserted here.
